identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a high-tech AI Job Search Agent that feels like a powerful command center/radar, not a generic SaaS.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Cyberpunk aesthetics with functional Data Dashboards.
Emotion First: The user should feel like a 'Hunter' using a precision tool.
Content is King: Data density is the aesthetic. No fluff.
Zoom In: Focus on the 'Signal' (Job Matches) amidst the 'Noise' (Internet).
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to make data pop.

design_theme.name: Electric Command Center
design_theme.description: A high-contrast, data-dense interface inspired by radar systems, terminals, and futuristic HUDs.

mono.purpose: Data tables, logs, code snippets, numbers

rules: Data (JetBrains Mono): Use for ALL tabular data and statistics.

spacing.rule: Generous spacing in Landing (Mode A), Tight spacing in Dashboard (Mode B).

dashboard.rule: Use h-full to stretch widgets. No jagged bottoms.

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)] border border-primary/50 transition-all active:scale-95 rounded-md
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 hover:bg-secondary/20 text-secondary border border-secondary/50 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(34,197,94,0.2)] rounded-md
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-border hover:border-primary/50 hover:text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-colors rounded-md

cards.classes: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-xl

inputs.classes: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 font-mono text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 rounded-md

visual_enhancers.name: Scanline Overlay
visual_enhancers.css: background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0), rgba(255,255,255,0) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2)); background-size: 100% 4px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 50; position: fixed; inset: 0; opacity: 0.05;

visual_enhancers.name: Radar Sweep
visual_enhancers.description: A rotating gradient circle to simulate scanning.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use generic gradients (e.g., to top right blue to purple). Use radial glows or 'spotlights'.
Ensure 3:1 contrast ratio for large text, 4.5:1 for normal text.
Use 'Tailwind Merge' (twMerge) and 'clsx' for class manipulation.
Use 'Recharts' for data visualization with custom tooltips.

setup: Install dependencies: `npm install lucide-react recharts framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge sonner`
Configure Tailwind colors in `tailwind.config.js` to match the Electric Palette.
Add the Google Fonts (Chivo, JetBrains Mono) to `index.html` or `index.css`.
implementation_order: 4. Build Job Tracker Table (The Core Feature)
